items.title: Fuming Raphinha: Barcelona 'robbed' in UCL exit
items.dek: Sidelined Barcelona star Raphinha hit out at the officiating following his team Champions League elimination, claiming refereeing errors cost them the tie again
items.body: Sidelined Barcelona star Raphinha hit out at the officiating following his team Champions League elimination, claiming refereeing errors cost them the tie against Atlético Madrid.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Liverpool have star power, but PSG show it takes more than talent to truly sparkle
items.dek: Liverpool's Champions League journey ended with a whimper Tuesday at the hands of a clinical Paris Saint-Germain.
items.body: Liverpool's Champions League journey ended with a whimper Tuesday at the hands of a clinical Paris Saint-Germain.
items.author: IriLine Desk
